name: HiNote

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
这是一个体验优化和发布流程改进版本，重点改善主视图批注编辑体验，并补齐 GitHub Release 资产来源证明。

### 更新内容

- 优化 All highlights 中的批注保存逻辑。
  - 新增或编辑批注后不再刷新整个高亮列表。
  - 保留当前滚动位置和卡片位置，避免保存后找不到刚刚编辑的内容。
- 优化批注删除和虚拟高亮取消逻辑。
  - 删除后只局部更新或移除当前卡片。
  - 减少不必要的全量重载。
- 修复部分插件审查 warning。
  - 将部分内联样式迁移到 CSS class。
  - 清理未使用的代码引用。
- 改进 GitHub Release workflow。
  - 使用 GitHub Actions 构建发布资产。
  - 为 `main.js`、`manifest.json`、`styles.css` 生成 artifact attestations。
  - 提高 release assets 的来源可验证性。

---

## English

This release improves the comment editing experience in the main view and updates the GitHub Release workflow with artifact attestations.

### Changes

- Improved comment saving in All highlights.
  - Adding or editing a comment no longer refreshes the entire highlight list.
  - The current scroll position and card position are preserved after saving.
- Improved comment deletion and virtual highlight cancellation.
  - Only the affected card is updated or removed.
  - Avoids unnecessary full-list reloads.
- Fixed several plugin review warnings.
  - Moved some inline styles to CSS classes.
  - Removed unused code references.
- Improved the GitHub Release workflow.
  - Release assets are built by GitHub Actions.
  - Added artifact attestations for `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
  - Release assets now have verifiable build provenance.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# HiNote 0.5.6

这是一次以架构整理、插件审查兼容性、核心高亮匹配稳定性和主视图体验为重点的版本更新。

### 主要更新

- 重构核心模块结构，拆分插件启动、视图、设置、存储、高亮渲染、闪卡和评论相关逻辑。
- 移除旧的独立 AI Chat 功能，保留与高亮批注相关的 AI 能力，减少非核心功能复杂度。
- 统一高亮与批注的匹配策略，降低文档编辑后批注错位或匹配不稳定的概率。
- 优化正文高亮批注预览和侧边栏批注显示的一致性。
- 优化主视图拖拽打开性能，避免拖拽进入主视图时触发不必要的全库高亮扫描。
- 恢复并优化高亮卡片瀑布流布局，支持视图宽度变化时自动调整列数。
- 优化桌面窄窗格和移动端布局，减少主视图被挤压的问题。
- 闪卡背面支持直接添加答案，并复用批注输入逻辑保存为高亮批注。
- 清理闪卡答案中的旧占位文本，例如 `Add answer`。
- 优化 HiCard 页面部分 UI，包括进度栏、分组文本显示和热力图布局。
- 修复多项 Obsidian 插件审查问题，包括 `innerHTML`、`document`、定时器、Promise 处理、弃用 API、CSS lint 等。

---


This release focuses on architecture cleanup, Obsidian plugin review compatibility, more reliable highlight/comment matching, and a smoother main-view experience.

### Highlights

- Refactored the core module structure, splitting plugin bootstrap, views, settings, storage, highlight rendering, flashcards, and comment logic into clearer boundaries.
- Removed the old standalone AI Chat feature while keeping AI capabilities that directly support highlight comments.
- Unified highlight/comment matching to reduce misplaced comments after document edits.
- Improved consistency between inline highlight comment previews and sidebar comment display.
- Improved main-view drag performance by avoiding unnecessary full-vault highlight scans when dragging the view into the main workspace.
- Restored and optimized the masonry layout for highlight cards, including automatic column adjustment on pane resize.
- Improved narrow desktop pane and mobile layouts to prevent the main view from being squeezed.
- Added support for creating flashcard back-side answers directly, saved through the same comment input flow.
- Cleaned legacy flashcard answer placeholders such as `Add answer`.
- Polished parts of the HiCard UI, including progress display, group text, and heatmap layout.
- Fixed multiple Obsidian plugin review issues, including `innerHTML`, `document`, timers, Promise handling, deprecated APIs, and CSS lint warnings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**🛠 修复**

- 修复批量删除功能异常的问题
- 修复「全部高亮」视图无法滚动加载的问题
- 修复修改高亮内容后，💬 批注图标不显示的问题
- 修复文件评论可能丢失的问题
- 修复删除批注时可能导致应用卡死的问题

**🔧 调整**

- 移除高亮的**模糊匹配**方式
    - 模糊匹配逻辑复杂、稳定性不足
    - 目前仅保留 **精确匹配** 与 **位置匹配** 两种更可靠的方案
- 移除批注中 **tag 标签的识别与应用功能**
    - 批注现已支持 Markdown 渲染
    - 标签渲染存在功能重叠，如因此影响使用请及时反馈

**✨ 新增**

- 新增：**阅读模式下**支持高亮跳转，并显示 💬 批注图标

**🚧 内部优化**

- 移除旧版 `data.json` 存储逻辑，全面切换至新的 `.hinote` 存储方案
- 重构批注的新增 / 删除 / 修改逻辑，支持**局部刷新**，提升性能
- 优化整体代码结构，提升稳定性与可维护性

---

**🛠 Fixes**

- Fixed issues with the batch delete feature
- Fixed an issue where the “All Highlights” view could not load more content when scrolling
- Fixed the 💬 comment icon not appearing after editing highlight content
- Fixed an issue where file comments could be lost
- Fixed a potential freeze when deleting comments

**🔧 Changes**

- Removed **fuzzy matching** for highlights
    - Fuzzy matching was overly complex and unreliable in practice
    - HiNote now only supports **exact matching** and **position-based matching** for better stability
- Removed **tag recognition and rendering** in comments
    - Comments now support full Markdown rendering
    - Tag rendering was redundant; please report if this change causes any issues

**✨ New**

- Added support for **highlight navigation in Reading Mode**, with visible 💬 comment icons

**🚧 Internal Improvements**

- Removed legacy `data.json` storage logic and fully migrated to the new `.hinote` storage format
- Refactored comment create / update / delete logic to support **partial refresh**, improving performance
- Improved overall code structure for better stability and maintainability

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
#### ✨ 新功能

- **自定义 AI 服务配置**：支持配置自己常用的 AI 服务商，不再局限于默认服务
- **批注展开/收起**：当批注内容超出显示范围时，自动添加展开/收起按钮，提升阅读体验

#### 🐛 问题修复

- **优化高亮文本识别**：改进正则表达式，避免错误匹配网址中包含的高亮符号（如 `==`）
- **文件列表选中状态**：修复文件列表未正确显示选中状态的问题

#### 🔧 优化改进

- **代码结构重构**：拆分大文件，提取独立功能模块（高亮、批注、文件列表等），提升代码可维护性
- **性能优化**：优化共享实例管理，提升插件运行效率

---

#### ✨ New Features

- **Custom AI Service Configuration**: Support for configuring your own preferred AI service providers, no longer limited to default services
- **Comment Expand/Collapse**: Automatically adds expand/collapse buttons when comment content exceeds the display area, improving reading experience

#### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- **Improved Highlight Text Recognition**: Enhanced regular expression to avoid incorrectly matching highlight symbols (e.g., `==`) within URLs
- **File List Selection State**: Fixed issue where file list did not properly display selected state

#### 🔧 Improvements

- **Code Structure Refactoring**: Split large files and extracted independent feature modules (highlights, comments, file list, etc.) to improve code maintainability
- **Performance Optimization**: Optimized shared instance management to enhance plugin performance

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 0.5.1 - 2025-09-14

- HiNote 插件已完成数据存储结构的重大优化，重构数据储存方式，将原有的 data. Json 数据自动迁移到 Vault 根目录中的 .hinote 文件夹中，并且将高亮和闪卡数据分文件单独存储。（重大更新，已经做了数据备份，过度阶段如出现问题请及时提交 issue 或通过 .hinote 中的 backup 文件恢复。）
	- 解决批注同步问题，可跟随 Vault 保持同步；
	- 解决插件卸载重装数据丢失问题，插件设置数据和高亮批注数据分离，重新安装可恢复高亮批注数据；
	- 数据迁移是自动执行的，不需要用户有任何操作。
	- 过渡阶段只做了数据迁移，过渡时期后会根据新的数据结构优化性能和体验。

### 0.5.1 - 2025-09-14

- The HiNote plugin has completed a major optimization of the data storage structure, reconstructed the data storage method, and automatically migrated the original data. Json data to the .hinote folder in the Vault root directory, and separately stored highlight and flashcard data in separate files. (Major update, data backup has been done. If any issues occur during the transition period, please submit an issue or restore from the backup file in the .hinote.) 
	- The annotation synchronization issue has been resolved, and it can be synchronized with Vault;
	- The issue of data loss after plugin uninstallation and reinstallation has been resolved, the plugin separates the settings data and highlight annotation data, and the highlight annotation data can be restored after reinstallation;
	- The data migration is executed automatically, and no user operation is required.
	- Only data migration was done during the transition period, and after the transition period, performance and experience will be optimized based on the new data structure.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 重要提示 ：如有重要的数据请先做好 data. json 文件的备份，此版本进行了功能的重构，可能会影响插件原有数据

### 0.4.0 - 2025-06-06

- 【HiCard】重构闪卡功能，现在根据创建的学习分组来管理卡片；
- 【HiCard】闪卡的更新和删除与高亮卡片保持同步 [#39](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/39)；
- 【HiCard】挖空支持，高亮内容中包含 {{符号}} ，则会转换成挖空卡片；
- 【HiCard】增加热力图学习统计；
- 【HiCard】增加从高亮卡片批量创建闪卡；
- 【HiCard】直接使用 ts-fsrs 5.0 依赖库；
- 高亮卡片增加框选功能，可对卡片批量导出和创建闪卡；
- 高亮卡片支持解析双向链接 [#45](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/45)  ；
- 高亮卡片增加复制高亮功能 [#38](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/38) ；
- 导出为图片支持显示批注内容 [#46](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/46) ；
- 优化主视图下不再依赖必须有激活文档才能正确获取全部高亮；
- 优化模糊匹配规则，解决高亮与批注匹配错误问题 [#39](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/39)；
- 优化设置菜单加载速度慢的问题；
- 优化设置菜单自定义表达式功能，现在可以逐条添加自定义规则 [#19](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/19) ；
- 修复高亮中包含换行时无法提取的问题 [#42](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/42) ；
- …

# Important Tip: Please make a backup of the data. Json file if there are any important data. This version has undergone a functional restructuring and may affect the original data of the plugin.

### 0.4.0 - 2025-06-06

- **[HiCard]** Flashcard functionality has been refactored. Cards are now managed according to the learning groups you create.
- **[HiCard]** Flashcard updates and deletions are now kept in sync with highlighted cards [#39](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/39).
- **[HiCard]** Cloze deletion is supported. If highlighted content contains `{{symbols}}`, it will be converted into a cloze (fill-in-the-blank) card.
- **[HiCard]** Heatmap learning statistics added.
- **[HiCard]** Bulk creation of flashcards from highlights is now supported.
- **[HiCard]** Directly uses the `ts-fsrs` 5.0 dependency.
- Highlighted cards now support box selection for bulk export and flashcard creation.
- Highlighted cards now support parsing of bidirectional links [#45](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/45).
- "Copy highlight" functionality added to highlighted cards [#38](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/38).
- Export to image now supports displaying annotation content [#46](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/46).
- Optimized the main view so that all highlights can be retrieved correctly without requiring an active document.
- Improved fuzzy matching rules to resolve highlight and annotation matching errors [#39](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/39).
- Optimized the slow loading of the settings menu.
- Enhanced the custom expression feature in the settings menu. You can now add custom rules one by one [#19](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/19).
- Fixed issues with extracting highlights that contain line breaks [#42](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiNote/issues/42).
- ...

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 0.3.3 - 2025-04-03

- 修复将高亮和批注导出为新笔记时 BlockID 添加位置问题；
- 新增自定义导出格式，包括以下可用占位字符：
	- `{{sourceFile}}` - 源文件名
	- `{{exportDate}}` - 导出日期时间
	- `{{highlightText}}` - 高亮文本内容
	- `{{highlightBlockRef}}` - 高亮的 BlockID 引用
	- `{{commentContent}}` - 评论内容
	- `{{commentDate}}` - 评论创建/更新日期
- 增加了模糊匹配高亮，小幅度修改高亮内容的话批注可自动匹配；
- 增加清理孤立数据功能，可以清理无高亮或文件关联的批注内容；
- 修复同行内多个高亮内容时，Widgets 统计数值错误问题；
- 新增 Markdown 渲染支持，包括：闪卡、高亮卡片、评论、AI 对话、Widget 悬停预览
- 根据插件社区修改建议，优化代码规范；

### 0.3.3 - 2025-04-03

- Fixed the issue with BlockID placement when exporting highlights and annotations as new notes;  
- Added custom export formats, including the following available placeholder variables:  
	- `{{sourceFile}}` - Source file name  
	- `{{exportDate}}` - Export date and time  
	 - `{{highlightText}}` - Highlighted text content  
	 - `{{highlightBlockRef}}` - BlockID reference of the highlight  
	 - `{{commentContent}}` - Comment content  
	 - `{{commentDate}}` - Comment creation/update date  
- Added fuzzy matching for highlights, allowing annotations to automatically match slightly modified highlighted content;  
- Added a feature to clean up orphaned data, removing annotations not linked to any highlight or file;  
- Fixed the incorrect Widgets count issue when multiple highlights exist within the same line;  
- Added Markdown rendering support, including: flashcards, highlight cards, comments, AI conversations, and Widget hover previews;  
- Optimized code standards based on feedback from the plugin community.

releases.author: CatMuse
releases.description:
- Simplified plugin name change: HiNote
- Added export to note feature, allowing highlights and comments to be exported as new notes;
- Added the ability to add comments to files, enabling notes to be added to files without relying on highlighted text;
- Support for Chinese and English (partially completed)；

---

- 简化插件名称：HiNote
- 添加导出到笔记功能，允许导出高亮和评论作为新笔记；
- 添加了添加文件注释的功能，使可以在不依赖高亮文本的情况下向文件添加笔记；
- 支持中文和英文（部分完成）；

releases.author: CatMuse
releases.description:
## New

- Add support for Chinese and English languages
- AI Service Settings, Add Gemini Service
- Added recognition < mark > tag color

releases.author: CatMuse
releases.description:
This AI-programmed Obsidian plugin can automatically extract highlighted text from notes, allowing users to add comments, generate AI comments, and engage in dialogue with the highlighted text. Users can highlight text in various formats, export it as knowledge card images, and enjoy additional extended features in the main view.

## Feature

- Highlighted text retrieval
- Highlighted comments
- Export as image
- Extended features of the main view
- AI Comment
- AI Chat
releases.name: v0.2.1 beta release
